Describe what is happening during the armor construction process.
canonical_answer: An elderly man wearing a striped polo shirt kneels on a blue mat holding a hammer and chisel while hands use red-handled pliers to work on chainmail armor. A person strikes a curved metal sheet with rows of small holes using a wooden mallet near a workbench cluttered with tools and papers.

question: Describe the sequence of armor displays and crafting actions shown throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a figure in red armor holds a katana under patterned ceilings; at 6s, a person wearing grey gloves hammers a curved metal piece on a wooden block; at 10s, dark armor with gold horns stands displayed; at 12s, hands use red-handled pliers on chainmail near red lacquered plates.

question: Outline the specific armor features and workshop tools visible during the clip.
canonical_answer: At 2s, red armor with visible silk lacing is held by a figure; at 4s, a full red suit stands beneath decorative ceiling panels; at 6s, a metal hammer strikes a curved object on wood; at 12s, red-handled pliers adjust linked metal rings near bright red plates.
